arts.sum: With Ugarte having only recently returned to training, Wes thinks Bruno will slot into that deeper midfield role alongside Casemiro, with an exciting attacking trio of first-leg goalscorer Zirkzee, Garnacho and Hojlund. United XI: Onana; Mazraoui, De Ligt, Lindelof; Dalot, Fernandes, Casemiro, Dorgu; Zirkzee, Hojlund, Garnacho.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Real Sociedad – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Manchester United host Real Sociedad tonight with a place in the Europa League’s quarter-finals at stake. The tie is perfectly poised after a 1-1 draw in San Sebastien a week ago, where Mikel Oyarzabal’s penalty cancelled out Joshua Zirkzee’s opener for the Red Devils. Ruben Amorim’s side are aiming to extend their five-game unbeaten run […] The post Manchester United vs Real Sociedad – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Real Sociedad – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Manchester United battle it out with Real Sociedad this evening for a place amongst the last eight of the Europa League. When the two sides met last week, the spoils were shared in Spain after an evenly contested encounter. Ruben Amorim has welcomed Mason Mount back to training over the last few days following a […] The post Manchester United vs Real Sociedad – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

Against Real Sociedad last Thursday, and Arsenal on Sunday, it was the same again: two challenging contests for the team to negotiate, during which De Ligt opened the shoulders and gave it everything. De Ligt’s first United goal at Old Trafford arrived in the game against Kieran McKenna’s side – a typically full-blooded stab home from close range, following a penalty-area stramash – and throughout that 10-man win, he and Harry Maguire seemed to be in their element.
